0 selected
Import roster
✕
Upload a CSV or paste from Google Sheets / Excel
📊 From Google Sheets:
File → Download → Comma Separated Values (.csv) — then upload below. Or copy your cells and paste directly.
Required columns (in any order):
name, number, position, year
Optional: height, weight, gpa, parent_name, parent_phone, parent_email
Example:
name,number,position,year
John Smith,7,QB,Senior
Mike Johnson,34,RB,Junior
📄
Click to upload CSV
or drag and drop a .csv file
— or paste CSV data directly —

Import calendar
Choose how to add your events
📋
Paste events
Type or paste a list of games in plain text — fastest option
📝
Build schedule manually
Add games one by one with full details — date, time, location, home/away
📅
Import .ics file
Import from Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, or Outlook
Paste events
✕
One event per line. Format:
8/29 vs Kuna 7:00 PM Home
10/3 Scrimmage vs Borah 10:00 AM
Tips: Start with "vs" for home games, "at" or "@" for away. Include time if you have it. Location is optional at the end.

Import Inventory
✕
📋 Equipment List
Master inventory — items & quantities
🏈 Gear Checkout
Players already have gear assigned
Equipment List columns:
name, category, brand, condition, size, quantity
Category: Helmet, Shoulder Pads, Jersey (Home), Jersey (Away), Pants, Girdle, Cleats, Other
Gear Checkout format:
Row 1: Player names in Column A, equipment types as column headers
Grade section rows (SENIORS, JUNIORS, etc.) are skipped automatically
X = item assigned · Model/size text = item details
— or —
📎 Upload .csv file
— or paste CSV —

Select item
✕
Export to Calendar
✕
Downloads a .ics file you can import into Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, or Outlook. All 2026 season games will be added.
💡 How to import: After downloading, tap the file to open it. Your phone will ask which calendar app to add it to. Tap Add.
Note: This is a one-time snapshot. If games are rescheduled, re-export to get the updated schedule. Live sync coming in the full app.
